inputs.name: tgt_cache_loc
inputs.meaning: Location in the target cache where data will be stored.
inputs.inference_role: Holds the starting index in the target cache for storing accepted tokens.

inputs.name: to_free_slots
inputs.meaning: Array to hold the slot indices that are to be freed in the cache.
inputs.inference_role: Contains indices of slots that can be freed in the cache, facilitating efficient memory management.

inputs.name: accept_length
inputs.meaning: Tensor that stores the length of accepted tokens for each batch.
inputs.inference_role: Indicates how many tokens have been accepted for each batch during sampling.

inputs.name: to_free_num_slots
inputs.meaning: Tensor that specifies the number of slots to free for each batch.
inputs.inference_role: Indicates how many slots are available to be freed in the cache.

inputs.name: out_cache_loc
inputs.meaning: Location of the output cache where tokens are temporarily stored.
inputs.inference_role: Used to fetch the tokens that will be considered for storage or eviction.

inputs.name: num_verify_tokens
inputs.meaning: Constant representing the number of tokens to verify.
inputs.inference_role: Defines the scope of verification across the token cache.

inputs.name: num_verify_tokens_upper
inputs.meaning: Upper bound for the number of verify tokens, used for grid sizing.
inputs.inference_role: Sets the maximum number of tokens for processing within the kernel.

inputs.name: bs_upper
inputs.meaning: Upper bound for the batch size, utilized for grid size calculations.
inputs.inference_role: Determines the maximum number of batches to process concurrently.

outputs.name: tgt_cache_loc (with accepted tokens)
outputs.meaning: Modified target cache location containing accepted tokens after execution.
outputs.inference_role: Stores the accepted tokens after they have been processed and potentially relocated.

outputs.name: to_free_slots (updated)
outputs.meaning: Updated array indicating the specific slots that are now free after processing.
outputs.inference_role: Provides indices of slots that have been freed, aiding in memory management.
